actual_manual_intervention_hours_per_wee.rationale: Issue 2 names exception-handling on used machinery as the dominant ceiling; base just above 2 hr/week reflects realistic Phase-6 execution with documented exceptions; upper bound captures Risk 5 grading-protocol variance.

actual_total_project_cost_usd.rationale: Plan envelope is $300–500K; Risk 3 names a $20–50K overrun scenario; Issue 1 adds 15% spare-parts buffer; base just below the $500K ceiling; upper bound captures combined overrun.

actual_opc_ua_bid_usd.rationale: Plan assumes ~$50K for OPC UA middleware; premortem trigger sits at $75K; base just above plan assumption reflects realistic vendor pricing; upper bound captures wire-bender protocol-complexity premium.

actual_api_p99_latency_ms.rationale: Plan budgets on-premise edge compute for low-latency control; base well within 100 ms target reflects realistic edge-compute performance; upper bound captures Risk 4 local-server-failure cloud-failover scenario.

actual_onsite_expert_cost_usd.rationale: Issue 3 names $15K baseline; review-plan gate caps at $25K; base captures realistic 1-week PLC specialist rate including mobilization; upper bound captures premium for obscure wire-bender protocols.
